requirement_topic.en: Kyrgyzstan Grid Connection — NEHC / NESK / NEGK Review, Anti-Islanding, and 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦并网——国家能源控股 / NESK / NEGK审查、防孤岛及220/380 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦併網——國家能源控股 / NESK / NEGK審查、防孤島及220/380 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: PV inverter deployment in Kyrgyzstan is a product-compliance and project-connection question. Product evidence may involve EAEU/EAC and Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC documentation, while grid connection is handled at project level through the National Energy Holding Company structure and relevant subsidiaries, including NESK distribution companies for distribution-level connection and NEGK for transmission-level issues. Kyrgyzstan's commonly used low-voltage supply is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, frequency windows, and anti-islanding behavior should be validated for local network settings. Because the grid is hydro-dominant and faces winter deficit stress, project reviewers may scrutinize protection coordination and operating modes more closely for energy-security projects.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦光伏逆变器部署同时涉及产品合规和项目接入。产品证据可能涉及EAEU/EAC以及Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC文件；并网则按项目层面由国家能源控股体系及相关子公司处理，包括配电层面的NESK配电公司和输电层面的NEGK。吉尔吉斯斯坦常见低压供电为220/380 V、50 Hz，因此逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延迟、频率窗口和防孤岛行为应按当地电网参数验证。由于电网以水电为主且冬季缺电压力明显，项目审查方可能对能源安全项目的保护配合和运行模式进行更严格审查。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦光伏逆變器部署同時涉及產品合規和項目接入。產品證據可能涉及EAEU/EAC以及Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC文件；併網則按項目層面由國家能源控股體系及相關子公司處理，包括配電層面的NESK配電公司和輸電層面的NEGK。吉爾吉斯斯坦常見低壓供電為220/380 V、50 Hz，因此逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲、頻率窗口和防孤島行為應按當地電網參數驗證。由於電網以水電為主且冬季缺電壓力明顯，項目審查方可能對能源安全項目的保護配合和運行模式進行更嚴格審查。

standards_or_laws: NEHC / NESK / NEGK technical connection conditions where applicable
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Kyrgyzstan low-voltage grid expectation: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
GOST / IEC standards adopted or accepted through Kyrgyzstandart where applicable

summary.en: China-side grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power stations connected to power systems, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or grid-code test results. These documents are based on Chinese grid rules, Chinese utility expectations, and manufacturer firmware profiles. They can support technical due diligence but do not transfer automatically to Kyrgyzstan grid-operator connection review.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或电网规范测试结果。这些文件基于中国电网规则、中国电力公司要求和制造商固件配置，可用于技术尽调，但不会自动转移为吉尔吉斯斯坦电网运营商接入审查的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國側併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021技術要求，以及國內防孤島或電網規範測試結果。這些文件基於中國電網規則、中國電力公司要求和製造商韌體配置，可用於技術盡調，但不會自動轉移為吉爾吉斯斯坦電網運營商接入審查的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid-code and anti-islanding reports are not NESK or NEGK connection approvals. Exporters should prepare a Kyrgyzstan-specific grid-settings table, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence where requested, firmware parameter records for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, and project-specific responses to distribution or transmission technical conditions. EAEU/EAC product conformity does not replace grid-operator connection review; both may be relevant.
gap.zh: 差距：中国电网规范和防孤岛报告不是NESK或NEGK接入批准。出口商应准备吉尔吉斯斯坦专用电网参数表、按要求提供IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据、220/380 V 50 Hz运行的固件参数记录，以及针对配电或输电技术条件的项目专用答复。EAEU/EAC产品符合性不能替代电网运营商并网审查；两者可能同时相关。
gap.zht: 差距：中國電網規範和防孤島報告不是NESK或NEGK接入批准。出口商應準備吉爾吉斯斯坦專用電網參數表、按要求提供IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據、220/380 V 50 Hz運行的韌體參數記錄，以及針對配電或輸電技術條件的項目專用答覆。EAEU/EAC產品符合性不能替代電網運營商併網審查；兩者可能同時相關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project grid connection where NEHC, NESK distribution companies, NEGK transmission requirements, Kyrgyzstandart-adopted standards, or project-owner specifications apply
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator or purchaser requirements but does not transfer automatically to Kyrgyzstan

source.publisher: National Electric Grid of Kyrgyzstan / NESK

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NESK or NEGK technical conditions as a project gate separate from Chinese GB/T grid evidence and separate from EAEU/EAC product conformity. Validate anti-islanding, reconnection, voltage, frequency, cold-start, and high-altitude operating settings for Kyrgyzstan's 220/380 V, 50 Hz network before connection submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将NESK或NEGK技术条件视为独立于中国GB/T并网证据和EAEU/EAC产品符合性的项目门槛。提交接入申请前，请针对吉尔吉斯斯坦220/380 V、50 Hz电网验证防孤岛、重连、电压、频率、低温启动和高海拔运行设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將NESK或NEGK技術條件視為獨立於中國GB/T併網證據和EAEU/EAC產品符合性的項目門檻。提交接入申請前，請針對吉爾吉斯斯坦220/380 V、50 Hz電網驗證防孤島、重連、電壓、頻率、低溫啟動和高海拔運行設定。

requirement_topic.en: Kyrgyzstan Solar Project Context — Hydro-Dominant Grid, Winter Deficits, and Mountain / Cold-Climate Operation
requirement_topic.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦太阳能项目背景——水电主导电网、冬季缺电及山区/寒冷气候运行
requirement_topic.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦太陽能項目背景——水電主導電網、冬季缺電及山區/寒冷氣候運行

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan's solar opportunity is linked to energy security: the power system is hydro-dominant, seasonal water constraints and winter demand create deficit risk, and solar projects may be developed for distributed self-consumption, remote sites, or utility support. Inverter acceptance should be checked at project level against the owner's technical specification, local grid-operator connection conditions, metering arrangement, altitude, ambient-temperature range, enclosure rating, cooling strategy, surge/lightning protection, and derating curves. A catalogue rating tested at standard laboratory conditions may not be sufficient for mountainous or cold-climate installations.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦太阳能机会与能源安全相关：电力系统以水电为主，季节性水资源约束和冬季需求造成缺电风险，太阳能项目可能用于分布式自用、偏远站点或公用事业支撑。逆变器接受应按项目层面结合业主技术规格、当地电网运营商接入条件、计量安排、海拔、环境温度范围、外壳防护等级、冷却策略、浪涌/防雷保护和降额曲线核实。按标准实验室条件测试的目录额定值可能不足以覆盖山区或寒冷气候安装。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦太陽能機會與能源安全相關：電力系統以水電為主，季節性水資源約束和冬季需求造成缺電風險，太陽能項目可能用於分散式自用、偏遠站點或公用事業支撐。逆變器接受應按項目層面結合業主技術規格、當地電網運營商接入條件、計量安排、海拔、環境溫度範圍、外殼防護等級、冷卻策略、浪湧/防雷保護和降額曲線核實。按標準實驗室條件測試的目錄額定值可能不足以覆蓋山區或寒冷氣候安裝。

standards_or_laws: Project-owner and lender technical specifications for solar PV projects in Kyrgyzstan
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 safety evidence including environmental ratings
IEC 61727 and IEC 62116 where grid-connected operation is required
Manufacturer altitude, temperature, cooling, and power-derating specifications

summary.en: China domestic inverter packages often include datasheets, GB/T 37408-2021 evidence, NB/T 32004 evidence, Chinese grid-code settings, and IEC certificates prepared for export. These documents may not show the exact altitude, low-temperature start-up, enclosure, cooling, surge-protection, or firmware configuration required for a Kyrgyzstan site.
summary.zh: 中国国内逆变器资料包通常包括数据表、GB/T 37408-2021证据、NB/T 32004证据、中国电网规范设置，以及为出口准备的IEC证书。这些文件未必显示吉尔吉斯斯坦场址所需的准确海拔、低温启动、外壳、冷却、浪涌保护或固件配置。
summary.zht: 中國國內逆變器資料包通常包括數據表、GB/T 37408-2021證據、NB/T 32004證據、中國電網規範設定，以及為出口準備的IEC證書。這些文件未必顯示吉爾吉斯斯坦場址所需的準確海拔、低溫啟動、外殼、冷卻、浪湧保護或韌體配置。

standards_or_laws: Manufacturer export datasheet and IEC certificate package

gap.en: Gap: Kyrgyzstan project risk is often site-specific rather than only standards-list based. Exporters should provide altitude and temperature derating tables, low-temperature start-up limits, cabinet heating or cooling details where used, surge/lightning protection coordination, and exact firmware settings for the connected grid. These records should be tied to the model number, hardware revision, firmware revision, and installation elevation.
gap.zh: 差距：吉尔吉斯斯坦项目风险往往具有场址特异性，而不只是标准清单问题。出口商应提供海拔和温度降额表、低温启动限制、如适用的柜体加热或冷却细节、浪涌/防雷保护配合，以及接入电网的准确固件设置。这些记录应绑定具体型号、硬件版本、固件版本和安装海拔。
gap.zht: 差距：吉爾吉斯斯坦項目風險往往具有場址特異性，而不只是標準清單問題。出口商應提供海拔和溫度降額表、低溫啟動限制、如適用的櫃體加熱或冷卻細節、浪湧/防雷保護配合，以及接入電網的準確韌體設定。這些記錄應綁定具體型號、硬體版本、韌體版本和安裝海拔。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory where required by the grid operator, project owner, tender, lender, installer, or environmental design basis
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid or factory certificates do not automatically prove suitability for Kyrgyzstan altitude and cold-climate deployment

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of the Kyrgyz Republic

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a China domestic datasheet rating as proof of Kyrgyzstan project suitability. Tie the inverter evidence package to the specific site altitude, minimum and maximum ambient temperature, grid settings, winter operating assumptions, and the current technical conditions issued by the relevant Kyrgyzstan grid operator or project owner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国国内数据表额定值视为吉尔吉斯斯坦项目适用性的证明。逆变器证据包应绑定具体场址海拔、最低和最高环境温度、电网参数、冬季运行假设，以及相关吉尔吉斯斯坦电网运营商或项目业主出具的现行技术条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國國內數據表額定值視為吉爾吉斯斯坦項目適用性的證明。逆變器證據包應綁定具體場址海拔、最低和最高環境溫度、電網參數、冬季運行假設，以及相關吉爾吉斯斯坦電網運營商或項目業主出具的現行技術條件。
